name: Valley View Golf Club
address: 3748 Lawrence Banet Rd, Floyds Knobs, IN 47119
about: Valley View Golf Club is an 18-hole public golf facility in Floyds Knobs, Indiana, featuring over 6,900 yards from the championship tees with a par of 72. The venue offers a full-service golf shop, Tap-ins Bar & Grill, indoor golf simulators, and golf instruction. Known for its sense of camaraderie and community, the club provides a full schedule of member tournaments throughout the year and is recognized as one of Southern Indiana's finest public golf courses. Its convenient location and comprehensive amenities make it a suitable destination for both serious golfers and casual players looking for a well-rounded golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium golf simulators for year-round play
Full-service Tap-ins Bar & Grill for post-game dining
Flexible membership options to accommodate all players
Host to numerous corporate and charity events annually

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with daily hours from noon to 8:00 PM, extended hours during live televised sports events
Full bar service available at Tap-ins Bar & Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs for the simulator experience. The venue does not mention club rental services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full-service kitchen and bar with Tap-ins Bar & Grill available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on a simulator?
faq.answer: The typical time to play 18 holes on a simulator varies, but it generally takes 1.5 to 2 hours, depending on player speed and simulator capacity.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Valley View Golf Club is family-friendly and welcomes juniors and youth, offering membership options and events suitable for families.
